description: INEC IReV (INEC Result Viewing) portal coverage for 2023 elections — stub.
notes: IReV required PU-level result sheets to be uploaded. INEC reported high compliance in some states, lower in others. Discrepancies between IReV uploads and announced results were a major controversy.

gaps.note: Per-state IReV upload compliance percentages not retrieved. Source: INEC 2023 post-election report or Civic Hub.
